originalBehavior: The published Ableton Playground mounts four synchronized lesson widgets through the Learning Music lesson shell, shared widget runtime, and route-local CSS.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published widget runtime and four-widget layout while replacing the broader Learning Music shell with route-local metadata and the shared public footer.
notes: The local route stays on the published widget stack instead of reimplementing the Playground in a custom sequencer shell.
Public provenance is limited to the shared footer rather than the upstream lesson navigation or marketing shell.
evidence: The shipped route mounts the original beats, basslines, chords, and melodies widgets under the vendored Ableton runtime.
Music smoke coverage verifies the route loads the local widget scripts before transport and edit interactions begin.

originalBehavior: The published Playground loads local lesson sample banks and keeps four musical lanes synchronized under one shared transport and tempo model.
localStatus: The local route keeps that shared transport model and archives the full shipped audio set inside the route tree so all playback comes from local assets.
notes: The route-local audio inventory is 31 archived audio files.
The widget bundle is patched so sample paths resolve to `./lessons/sounds/` instead of the upstream root path.
evidence: Implementation inventory captured the full Playground sample bank under the route tree before shipping.
Music smoke coverage verifies zero remote playable media requests and a transport start across the local archive build.

originalBehavior: The published Playground lets users create or delete notes, change scales and roots, adjust tempo, and export the current state to Ableton Live through the published export service.
localStatus: The local route keeps note editing, scale or root changes, and tempo control paths while neutralizing the export surface because the upstream export handoff depends on a non-archived remote service.
notes: Export buttons are disabled and relabeled as unavailable in the local archive build.
Interactive editing, transport, and multitrack sync remain part of the shipped public route.
evidence: The route shell rewrites export copy to neutral local text while preserving the rest of the widget controls.
Music smoke coverage verifies one edit path changes the active state and that transport remains synchronized after interaction.

originalBehavior: The published page is wrapped in the Learning Music shell, including navigation, feedback surfaces, and an external provenance trail beyond the lesson itself.
localStatus: The local route archives the first-party media inventory locally, removes the wider Learning Music shell from the public body, and leaves the shared footer as the only original-page reference surface.
notes: The shipped route archives 31 audio files and 9 font files under the local route tree.
The page body no longer includes upstream shell, cookie, or feedback surfaces.
evidence: The docs contract records the exact local media counts required by the music-family shipping policy.
The public-surface audit and music smoke group enforce footer-only provenance and zero remote playable media requests for this route.
